hero.headline: I build digital products.
hero.subheadline: Webs and platforms that convert. Fixed price. Delivered in weeks.

items.title: Strategy
items.desc: Before building anything, we define who it's for, what problem it solves, and how it pays off. Without this, the best code in the world won't convert.

items.title: Architecture
items.desc: Your brand is the first filter. A design that doesn't convey trust loses clients before they read a single line.

items.title: Product
items.desc: The site your clients visit before calling you. The platform that processes your sales. What makes the business work digitally.

items.title: Growth
items.desc: A launched product is not a selling product. Growth is the difference between having a presence and generating demand.

zolfo-medicina-estetica.tagline: Every patient who searches for a treatment on Google and doesn't find you, goes to your competitor.
zolfo-medicina-estetica.description:
Zolfo had a high-end clinic but a digital presence that didn't reflect it. The result: patients searching for their treatments on Google ended up at another clinic.

Today, the site converts 47% of visits into actual inquiries. Each treatment has its own page optimized for Google. The patient arrives, browses, and books — with zero friction.

765 active users in the first month. 444 contacts generated. 100% uptime.

features.title: Individual SEO
features.desc: When someone searches for 'hyaluronic acid in Rosario', Zolfo appears — not the competition.

features.title: WhatsApp conversion
features.desc: 47% of those who visit the site end up messaging via WhatsApp. No complicated forms, no friction.

features.title: Admin panel
features.desc: Upload a new photo, change a price, add a treatment. Solo. Without calling anyone.

features.title: Speed
features.desc: Google penalizes slow sites. This one loads in under a second. That is search positioning without paying for ads.

features.title: Stability
features.desc: Not a single crash over the entire period. Every hour a site is down is money lost.

metrics.title: Metrics & Outcomes
metrics.treatments_desc: Views distribution per treatment (GA Page Views)

cards.label: Lead Conversion
cards.desc: Nearly 1 out of 2 visitors ends up messaging to book. The site sells itself.

cards.label: Booking Leads
cards.desc: 444 potential patients in a month. No additional ads, no extra effort.

cards.label: Active Users
cards.desc: 765 people visited the clinic digitally. Far more than in person.

cards.label: Page Views
cards.desc: 5,456 times someone explored a treatment. Every view is a purchase intent.

nurestetica.tagline: Patients choose based on trust. Trust enters through the eyes in the first three seconds.
nurestetica.description:
Aesthetic patients are demanding. Before booking an appointment, they have already checked Instagram, searched on Google, and visited the site of at least three clinics.

NurEstética needed a presence that convinced in the first few seconds. No excess text. No slow loading. No generic design.

The result: 100/100 in user experience, loads in 0.35 seconds, zero layout shifts. The site feels as meticulously cared for as the clinic itself.

features.title: Design
features.desc: Design is not decoration. It is the first filter the patient uses to decide whether to trust.

features.title: Speed
features.desc: 0.35 seconds load time. The patient visiting from a phone doesn't wait — and this site doesn't make them wait.

features.title: Booking
features.desc: Every section ends with a clear action step: book, consult, or see more. The path to an appointment is always just one click away.

features.title: Visual stability
features.desc: Perfect CLS: nothing shifts while loading. A small technical detail that makes a huge difference in perceived quality.

features.title: Infrastructure
features.desc: It works. Always. Without anyone having to remember to update or renew anything.

cards.label: User Experience
cards.desc: The maximum score possible. Measured on real users, not in a lab.

cards.label: Load Speed
cards.desc: The site responds in a third of a second. The patient doesn't wait or close the tab.

cards.label: Visual Stability
cards.desc: Nothing jumps, nothing shifts while loading. The user trusts from the first second.

cards.label: SEO Optimization
cards.desc: Max score from Google. Maximum organic visibility without paying for ads.

authmotion.tagline: Control who enters your platform, what they see, and what they can do. Without relying on generic solutions.
authmotion.description:
As your platform grows, access becomes a challenge. Who can view billing data? Who can edit? Who should only have read-only access?

AuthMotion is the answer. An enterprise-grade authentication and permissions system, ready to integrate into any platform. Two-factor authentication, Google or GitHub login, custom roles.

Without paying for licenses. Without depending on third parties. Without reinventing the wheel every time.

features.title: 2FA
features.desc: A password alone is not enough. Two-factor authentication blocks 99% of unauthorized access — even if the password is known.

features.title: Social login
features.desc: Less friction at signup = more users completing the process. A single click with Google is enough.

features.title: Roles
features.desc: Define exactly who sees what. The new employee doesn't access what they shouldn't. The client doesn't modify what they mustn't.

features.title: Scalability
features.desc: Works exactly the same with 100 users as with 100,000. The infrastructure grows with the business, not the other way around.

features.title: Security
features.desc: Your customers' data is not yours to lose. Encryption, secure tokens, and industry best practices from day one.

cards.label: License
cards.desc: No monthly subscriptions. No depending on another company raising their prices.

cards.label: Authentication
cards.desc: Even if they steal the password, they can't get in. Access requires the owner's phone.

cards.label: Integration
cards.desc: Users register with Google. No long forms, no passwords to forget.

cards.label: Portability
cards.desc: Runs on AWS, Azure, or your own server. Without being locked into any provider.

smartwallet.tagline: An accounting error in production is not a bug. It's money disappearing. Or customers who don't return.
smartwallet.description:
When a platform handles money, the margin of error is zero. A duplicate charge, an unbalanced ledger, a lost transaction — any of these destroys trust in minutes.

SmartWallet is the financial engine that solves this. Double-entry bookkeeping as used by banks. A security vault for sensitive credentials. Atomic transactions that aren't lost even if the server crashes mid-process.

Ready to connect to any existing platform via API.

features.title: Double-entry
features.desc: Every dollar that enters has a destination. Every dollar that leaves has an origin. Impossible for the balance to become offset.

features.title: Vault
features.desc: Access keys, tokens, and sensitive data live in a hardware vault. Not in an environment variable that someone could inspect.

features.title: Transactions
features.desc: If two users perform an operation simultaneously, the system resolves it without duplicating or losing anything. The money always arrives.

features.title: API
features.desc: Connects to what you already have. No need to rebuild the platform — SmartWallet integrates as a module.

features.title: Audit
features.desc: Every movement is recorded forever. If there is a dispute, you have the complete history. If there is fraud, it is detected.

cards.label: Ledger Precision
cards.desc: Every cent has a registered origin and destination. The balance never offsets. Never.

cards.label: Data Security
cards.desc: Credentials do not live in the code. They live in secure hardware. Just like a bank.

cards.label: Transactions
cards.desc: If the server crashes mid-payment, nothing is left half-done. Everything goes through or nothing does.

cards.label: Integration
cards.desc: Connects to your app, website, or sales system. Without rebuilding anything.

malcombuilder.tagline: The showcase of my technical studio. Designed to convert visits into clients.
malcombuilder.description:
This is my own platform. I designed and built it using advanced AI as an execution lever to achieve a flawless, ultra-fast, and premium multilingual site. It showcases my work philosophy: extreme speed, author design, and zero user friction.

WHAT IT SOLVES
A slow or generic portfolio fails to convince anyone. This site serves as a living proof of concept of what I can build for your business: an interactive experience that loads in milliseconds, speaks your client's language, and builds immediate trust to close the sale.

features.title: Premium interactive experience
features.desc: Fluid animations and micro-interactions that capture attention without slowing navigation.

features.title: Native multi-locale (ES/EN)
features.desc: Automatic detection and instant server-side language switching without page reloads.

features.title: State-of-the-art performance
features.desc: Perfect scores on Google's performance audits, ensuring top organic ranking.

features.title: Smooth Dark / Light toggle
features.desc: Intelligent adaptation to the user's color scheme with smooth, natural transitions.

features.title: Total SEO optimization
features.desc: Fully indexable site structure, automated sitemap, and dynamic metadata for maximum visibility.

cards.label: Conversion
cards.desc: Each section guides the visitor to the next step. Contact details are always visible.

cards.label: Languages
cards.desc: Spanish and English instantly. Without reloading the page.

cards.label: Visual Style
cards.desc: Editorial dark design with bold typography. The first impression that converts.

cards.label: Performance
cards.desc: Perfect score from Google. Instant loading, better organic ranking.

pulse.tagline: Your website went down. How long did it take you to find out? How many customers did you lose in the meantime?
pulse.description:
A site that goes down without anyone knowing is worse than not having a website. The client tries to enter, fails, and goes elsewhere. You find out hours later.

Pulse monitors your site every 5 minutes. If something fails, it alerts you instantly on Telegram. If the SSL certificate is about to expire, it warns you before browsers block access.

It also generates automatic monthly uptime reports — so you have documented history to hold your hosting provider accountable when failures occur.

features.title: Monitoring
features.desc: Every 5 minutes, Pulse verifies that your site responds. If it doesn't, you know it before any customer does.

features.title: Alerts
features.desc: The warning reaches your phone in seconds. Not the next day, not when someone complains — in the moment.

features.title: SSL
features.desc: An expired certificate makes browsers show 'insecure site' to all your visitors. Pulse warns you before it happens.

features.title: Reports
features.desc: Each month, a PDF report with your uptime history. If your hosting fails frequently, you have the data to complain — or to switch.

features.title: Dashboard
features.desc: A panel where you can see in real time if everything is working. Green is green. Red is trouble.

cards.label: Frequency
cards.desc: Uptime check every 5 minutes. You know before your customers if something fails.

cards.label: Alert Channel
cards.desc: Instant notification to your phone at the slightest downtime

cards.label: Uptime History
cards.desc: Complete uptime log. If your hosting provider fails, you have the data to file a claim.

cards.label: SSL Certificate
cards.desc: Warns before it expires. Prevents browsers from flagging your site as insecure.
